title: CSV, JSON Lines, Schemas, Stable Output, Redaction, and Accessible Reports · Program Brief: Jsonl Schema
summary: Columns reorder between runs, newlines corrupt CSV, None becomes ambiguous, JSON arrays cannot stream, secrets enter logs, and the visual report has no table semantics. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the jsonl schema increment in versioned machine and accessible human report. Learners progress through prediction, explicit th…
objectives: Emit one bounded versioned JSON record per line with stable types, Unicode policy, provenance, and explicit invalid-record handling.
Define UTF-8, newline handling, dialect, ordered fields, quoting, formula policy, missing values, limits, and atomic replacement.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: scraper-jsonl-schema — Emit one bounded versioned JSON record per line with stable types, Unicode policy, provenance, and explicit invalid-record handling.
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-export-accessible-reports-4
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-export-accessible-reports-4.
# Case 1655: a local-server failure rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: automated findings must not claim ranking or WCAG conformance.
# Changed case: change a robots, canonical, indexing, structured-data, or accessibility signal and retain the conflict.
def worked_scraper_export_accessible_reports_4(valid_records: int = 48, csv_rows: int = 48, jsonl_rows: int = 48, accessible_findings: int = 48, leaked_sensitive_fields: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorizationworked4",
        "url1655",
        "response4dekrow",
        "treeworked41655",
        "frontier1655worked4",
        "report4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if valid_records < 1 or csv_rows < 0 or jsonl_rows < 0:
        return False, valid_records, "export-count"
    if csv_rows != valid_records or jsonl_rows != valid_records:
        return False, csv_rows, "export-reconciliation"
    if accessible_findings != valid_records:
        return False, accessible_findings, "accessible-report-gap"
    if leaked_sensitive_fields > 0:
        return False, leaked_sensitive_fields, "redaction-gap"
    assert csv_rows == valid_records and jsonl_rows == valid_records
    return True, csv_rows, "stable-accessible-reports"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-jsonl-schema-lud5g9
# Competency: scraper-jsonl-schema.
# Case 3597: a clean package and recovery drill.
# Operating constraint: the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure.
# Changed case: replace a static fixture with an explicitly authorized dynamic case and restate the browser budget.
def evidence_scraper_jsonl_schema_lud5g9(valid_records: int = 48, csv_rows: int = 48, jsonl_rows: int = 48, accessible_findings: int = 48, leaked_sensitive_fields: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_lud5g9 = "lud5g9-9g5dul-3597"
    assert evidence_variant_lud5g9
    evidence_axes_lud5g9 = (
        "authorizationlud5g9",
        "url3597",
        "response9g5dul",
        "treelud5g93597",
        "frontier3597lud5g9",
        "report9g5dul3597",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_lud5g9)) == 6
    if valid_records < 1 or csv_rows < 0 or jsonl_rows < 0:
        return False, valid_records, "export-count"
    if csv_rows != valid_records or jsonl_rows != valid_records:
        return False, csv_rows, "export-reconciliation"
    if accessible_findings != valid_records:
        return False, accessible_findings, "accessible-report-gap"
    if leaked_sensitive_fields > 0:
        return False, leaked_sensitive_fields, "redaction-gap"
    assert csv_rows == valid_records and jsonl_rows == valid_records
    return True, csv_rows, "stable-accessible-reports"

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Jsonl Schema structural check is only one gate. versioned machine and accessible human report must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

hints: For Authorized crawling and Python Build Jsonl Schema evidence · Theory Jsonl Schema, name the owner, authorization, stakeholder, revision, runtime, dependency, seed, URL, origin, robots, response, parser, selector, record, frontier, privacy, report, stop, recovery, and transfer boundary, Jsonl Schema precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Authorized crawling and Python Build Jsonl Schema evidence · Theory Jsonl Schema, trace this concrete input and predict authorization, URL admission, robots, fetch, redirect, decode, parse, extract, provenance, schedule, report, rejection, stop, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A theory site-quality team handles case 8158 during an authorized nonprofit content audit. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile stable CSV and JSON Lines exports, accessible human reports, provenance, and redaction; personal data must remain minimized and redacted; then replace a static fixture with an explicitly authorized dynamic case and restate the browser budget. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Emit one bounded versioned JSON record per line with stable types, Unicode policy, provenance, and explicit invalid-record handling.

For Authorized crawling and Python Build Jsonl Schema evidence · Theory Jsonl Schema, challenge the documented misconception with changed-authorization, URL, robots rule, response, encoding, markup, selector, frontier, timing, session, browser, privacy, security, export, failure, recovery, and controlled owner transfer evidence: A single giant JSON array is the most resilient streaming format.

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Defend the Jsonl Schema model · Theory Jsonl Schema
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Jsonl Schema: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory site-quality team handles case 9777 during a clean package and recovery drill. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile stable CSV and JSON Lines exports, accessible human reports, provenance, and redaction; personal data must remain minimized and redacted; then inject one retry, cancellation, queue, checkpoint, or output failure and recover cleanly. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Emit one bounded versioned JSON record per line with stable types, Unicode policy, provenance, and explicit invalid-record handling.

Evidence target: Authorized crawling and Python Defend the Jsonl Schema model · Theory Jsonl Schema.
steps.why: Retrieving Jsonl Schema through the concrete versioned machine and accessible human report case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Authorized crawling and Python Defend the Jsonl Schema model · Theory Jsonl Schema, keep Jsonl Schema connected to executable Python authorization, URL, response, parse, provenance, frontier, report, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Emit one bounded versioned JSON record per line with stable types, Unicode policy, provenance, and explicit invalid-record handling.

checks.description: The cumulative python portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker # Evidence: scraper-jsonl-schema-lud5g9.

checks.pattern: # Evidence: scraper-jsonl-schema-lud5g9(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?def\s+evidence_scraper_jsonl_schema_lud5g9\s*\((?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?\)\s*(?:->[^:]+)?\s*:(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?valid_records < 1 or csv_rows < 0 or jsonl_rows < 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?csv_rows != valid_records or jsonl_rows != valid_records)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?accessible_findings != valid_records)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?leaked_sensitive_fields > 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?assert)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
